Video.summary: Gina Goetter is the CFO and COO of Hasbro; she's the architect of the company's transformation, while diversifying its manufacturing footprint and investing in Hasbro's video game ambitions.
Video.title: Gina Goetter, Hasbro

Image.alt: Gina Goetter, Hasbro
Gina Goetter, Hasbro
Gina Goetter, Hasbro
Gina Goetter, Hasbro

Video.summary: Candid conversations with CEOs, investors, and government leaders focused on how to navigate and prosper in this age of economic uncertainty. Hosted by Erik Schatzker in Singapore.
Video.title: Thriving in an Age of Extremes

Image.alt: Thriving in an Age of Extremes
Thriving in an Age of Extremes
Thriving in an Age of Extremes
Thriving in an Age of Extremes

Video.summary: The Making of a Chinese Spy - Ji Chaoqun was a promising young engineer from Beijing heading to the US to study. Then China's spy agency came calling with bags of cash, the promise of glory and an offer that would change his life forever.
Video.title: Airplane Thief

Image.alt: Airplane Thief
Airplane Thief
Airplane Thief
Airplane Thief

Video.summary: The Malaysian Anti-Corruption Commission is supposed to root out graft. Instead, some of its members have been accused of perpetuating the very wrongdoing they were meant to stop.
Video.title: MACC

Video.summary: Melinda French Gates discusses transitioning to a different path, practicing values-based leadership and handling public scrutiny.
Video.grandparentTitle: Leaders with Francine Lacqua: The Podcast
Video.title: Melinda French Gates on Leading With Integrity

Image.alt: Melinda French Gates on Leading With Integrity
Melinda French Gates on Leading With Integrity
Melinda French Gates on Leading With Integrity
Melinda French Gates on Leading With Integrity
Melinda French Gates on Leading With Integrity

Video.summary: Chinese companies dominate the EV battery supply chain and are expanding rapidly outside their home market. Meanwhile, competitors are looking to new chemistries to leapfrog the leading tech.
Video.title: The Race to Challenge China's EV Lead

Image.alt: The Race to Challenge China's EV Lead
The Race to Challenge China's EV Lead
The Race to Challenge China's EV Lead
The Race to Challenge China's EV Lead
The Race to Challenge China's EV Lead

Video.summary: Semiconductors power modern technology, from AI to everyday devices; global tensions and rising demand are forcing the chip supply chain to adapt.
Video.title: AI Is Pushing Chipmaking to Its Limits

AI Is Pushing Chipmaking to Its Limits
AI Is Pushing Chipmaking to Its Limits

Video.summary: HSBC CEO Georges Elhedery joins Francine Lacqua to explain why he is ruthless about killing complexity as he pushes through an AI-fuelled overhaul of one of the world's biggest banks.
Video.grandparentTitle: Leaders with Francine Lacqua: The Podcast
Video.title: HSBC CEO Georges Elhedery on Leadership, AI and the Future of Global Banking

Video.summary: Humanoid robots that use AI are going mainstream, but they're far from proven. With billions of dollars invested, can they deliver real-world value, or will they fall short of the hype?

The Race To Merge AI With Humanoid Robots

Video.summary: Jon Gray emphasizes the importance of resilience, clear decision-making and maintaining humanity in leadership, especially during tough times.

Video.summary: Nuclear power is attempting a comeback, but producing the necessary fuel is complex; from mining to enrichment, can new technologies and supply chains scale to power the next generation of reactors?
Video.title: Making New Nuclear Fuel for an Atomic Renaissance

Making New Nuclear Fuel for an Atomic Renaissance
Making New Nuclear Fuel for an Atomic Renaissance

Video.summary: Bringing global investors everything you need to know as the trading day begins in Asia; Bloomberg TV is live from Tokyo and Sydney with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders on the biggest stories shaping markets, from tech, to geopolitics, and the world's energy transition.
Video.title: Bloomberg The Asia Trade

Image.alt: Bloomberg The Asia Trade
Bloomberg The Asia Trade
Bloomberg The Asia Trade
Bloomberg The Asia Trade

Video.summary: From London, essential morning viewing to stay ahead of the day's market trends with news stories from the U.S. and Asia in the lead-up to the opening of European markets.
Video.title: Bloomberg Daybreak: Europe

Image.alt: Bloomberg Daybreak: Europe
Bloomberg Daybreak: Europe
Bloomberg Daybreak: Europe
Bloomberg Daybreak: Europe

Video.summary: "The Opening Trade" explores things to know as markets open across Europe; analysis that isn't available anywhere else, a break-down of the biggest stories of the day and top guests who have skin in the game.
Video.title: Bloomberg The Opening Trade

Image.alt: Bloomberg The Opening Trade
Bloomberg The Opening Trade
Bloomberg The Opening Trade
Bloomberg The Opening Trade

Video.summary: "The Pulse With Francine Lacqua" is all about conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, economics, finance and politics; based in London, we go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.
Video.title: The Pulse with Francine Lacqua

Image.alt: The Pulse with Francine Lacqua

Video.summary: Your definitive source for news and analysis on the world's second-biggest economy; from politics and policy to tech and trends, Yvonne Man and David Ingles give global investors unique insight, delivering in-depth discussions with the newsmakers who matter.

Video.summary: Scientists are developing more powerful magnets to enable clean energy sources like fusion; China's dominance of the supply chain for rare earth magnets threatens their global availability.

The Business of Adapting to Flood Risk

Video.summary: Exploring the real-life cases handled by the Social Media Victims Law Center, which assists parents of children who have died as a result of harmful internet activities.
Video.grandparentTitle: Can't Look Away: The Case Against Social Media
Video.title: Can't Look Away: The Case Against Social Media

Image.alt: Can't Look Away: The Case Against Social Media
Can't Look Away: The Case Against Social Media
Can't Look Away: The Case Against Social Media
Can't Look Away: The Case Against Social Media

Video.summary: In a volatile and unpredictable world, the show will be the definitive guide for the global news audience to get the complete picture on the biggest story of the day. With news making executives, officials and thought-leaders from the world of business, politics and academia we will explore a story through probing interviews and nuanced conversations. The hour of programming will also highlight the most relevant stories from India which is currently one of the hottest investment destinations, but also has compelling stories that play into the Bloomberg's priority issues such as Climate change, Diversity and Technological innovation.
Video.title: Insight With Haslinda Amin

Image.alt: Insight With Haslinda Amin
Insight With Haslinda Amin
Insight With Haslinda Amin
Insight With Haslinda Amin

Video.summary: A spotlight on the fast paced growth and major deals happening across the Middle East and Africa; linking the market drivers from overnight in the US and across Asia into the region's trading day, with deep dive analysis of the top business, energy and geopolitical stories shaping the decisions of traders across the Middle East, Africa and beyond.
Video.title: Bloomberg Horizons Middle East & Africa

Image.alt: Bloomberg Horizons Middle East & Africa
Bloomberg Horizons Middle East & Africa
Bloomberg Horizons Middle East & Africa
Bloomberg Horizons Middle East & Africa

Video.summary: On this week's Leaders with Francine Lacqua, she speaks with Rolls-Royce Chief Executive Officer Tufan Erginbilgiç about confronting the company's weaknesses with data-driven honesty and setting a clear, granular strategy to transform performance.
Video.grandparentTitle: Leaders with Francine Lacqua: The Podcast
Video.title: Rolls-Royce CEO Tufan Erginbilgiç on Transforming a British Icon

Video.summary: Shell Chief Executive Officer Wael Sawan joins Francine Lacqua to discuss the oil major's controversial strategy around the energy transition, and fostering a culture that shifts from all-knowing to all-learning.
Video.grandparentTitle: Leaders with Francine Lacqua: The Podcast
Video.title: Wael Sawan on Leading Shell: Control What You Can Amid Global Uncertainty
